text:
https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000002-I000008856377 is a software developed by GAINAX and released by Pioneer LDC (Catalog Number KIRA-3) on 21 March 1997 for 5,280 yen. https://evacollector.com/eva-no1770-pc-daily-selection/ 

Overview

It is a collection of almost 400 images, which includes many famous scenes shown on TV and illustrations published in magazines and other publications. Also included are two modes: 800 x 600 and 640 x 480 (256 custom colors) for Windows, and 832 x 621 and 640 x 480 (32,000 colors) for Macintosh. Full-screen display is possible on a 17-inch monitor.
